name: Drive Shack
about: Drive Shack Richmond is a high-tech golf entertainment venue located 20 minutes from downtown. It combines an interactive driving range with an upscale sports bar atmosphere, offering a blend of golf play, dining, and social experiences. The facility features climate-controlled bays, a rooftop terrace, and a full-service bar and restaurant, positioning itself as a comprehensive destination for both golf and social gatherings in the Richmond area.
why_golfers_like_it: Interactive golf games and multiple course simulations
Upscale dining and full bar experience
Rooftop terrace and lounge areas for socializing
TrackMan technology for accurate shot tracking

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with a chef-inspired menu available
Full bar with craft drinks and cocktails served

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are not explicitly mentioned, but the venue provides golf clubs for use in the bays as part of the experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has its own full-service kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulation times vary depending on the course and number of players, but typical sessions last 1-2 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Drive Shack is family-friendly with a Puttery mini-golf section available, though the main golf bays are geared toward adults.
